creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
The directory /pub/src/Xclients.local/ doesn't exist on ftp.cs.orst.edu .

Fix: 

Good question.  neither altavista nor archie nor the X FAQ are much
help at locating real machines with copies of xgraph, other than
mirrors of FreeBSD distfiles.  Perhaps the existing distfile should
just get moved to LOCAL_PORTS?
How-To-Repeat: 
	
"make fetch" in xgraph port, watch it fall back to freebsd.org
